articles.title: Hardware HSM vs Browser HSM: Choosing the Right Cryptographic Signing Method
articles.excerpt: YubiKey, smart cards, or browser-based keys? A comprehensive guide to choosing the right cryptographic signing method for your enterprise — and why zero-trust local-first architectures are reshaping the industry.

articles.title: Your Documents Never Leave Your Browser: The Zero-Trust Architecture Explained
articles.excerpt: Unlike every other eSignature platform, SuperSecureDoc processes everything locally. Here's the technical architecture behind our zero-trust, browser-first approach and why it matters for enterprise security.
articles.author: Suhasini Oliveira

articles.title: Hedera Consensus Service for Tamper-Proof Audit Trails
articles.excerpt: How Hedera blockchain anchors every signature, creating immutable timestamps and verifiable audit trails that stand up to regulatory scrutiny.

articles.title: Scan-to-Sign: Turning Your Phone Into a Cryptographic Authenticator
articles.excerpt: How QR code pairing and biometric authentication turn any smartphone into a soft HSM for cryptographic signing — no hardware token required.

articles.title: HIPAA-Compliant Document Signing Without Storing PHI
